name: flutter_devtools_mcp
description: Robust MCP server for Flutter DevTools automation. Connects via VM Service WebSocket with mDNS auto-discovery.

tools.name: discover
tools.description: Scan for running Flutter debug apps via mDNS. Returns detected VM Service URLs.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check connection status and detect available Flutter debug apps.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Connect to a Flutter debug app. No args = auto-discover via mDNS. Pass vmServiceUrl to connect explicitly.

vmServiceUrl.description: VM Service WebSocket URL (optional — auto-discovers via mDNS if omitted)

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Get the current widget tree as LLM-friendly JSON.

tools.name: inspect
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Get detailed properties of a specific widget node.

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Tap a widget by selector (semantics:, key:, text:, index:).

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Focus a text field by selector and enter text.

tools.name: scroll
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Scroll a scrollable widget in a direction.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Capture the current screen as PNG.

tools.name: hot_reload
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Trigger hot reload on the connected Flutter app.

tools.name: evaluate
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Evaluate a Dart expression in the running app.

tools.name: press_back
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Press the system back button / pop the top route.

tools.name: toggle_dark_mode
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Toggle dark/light mode.

tools.name: toggle_platform
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Override the target platform (android, ios, ...).

tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Get memory usage of the Flutter app.

tools.name: dump_semantics
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Dump the accessibility/semantics tree.

tools.name: hot_restart
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Full hot restart — resets all app state.

tools.name: get_errors
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Get Flutter framework errors.

tools.name: toggle_debug_paint
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Toggle widget boundary overlay.

tools.name: toggle_repaint_rainbow
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Toggle repaint rainbow overlay.

tools.name: toggle_slow_animations
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Slow down or restore animation speed.

tools.name: toggle_performance_overlay
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Toggle frame timing graphs overlay.

tools.name: get_render_tree
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Dump the render object tree as text.

tools.name: get_layer_tree
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Dump the compositing layer tree.

tools.name: get_parent_chain
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Get parent chain for a node ID.

tools.name: track_rebuilds
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Toggle widget rebuild tracking.

tools.name: track_repaints
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Toggle repaint tracking.

tools.name: get_logs
tools.description: Requires: connect first. Capture recent app output logs.
